title: ESCOLHA A RESPOSTA CORRETA
answer: B
subtitle: I will call you.                                                          I told her that I ____ her.

title: Repita a frase
answer: I told her that I would call her
translate: Eu disse a ela que lhe telefonaria.

answer: A
